insight_text: Monthly revenue shows a concerning decline, culminating in a drastic 74% drop in March 2026 ($1,759.13) compared to February ($6,825.78), posing an immediate and severe business risk.
Electronics is the clear top-performing category, generating $37,174.62 in revenue, significantly outpacing other categories and highlighting a key strength.
Segment 1 is the most valuable customer group, with only 199 customers but an exceptional average spend of $216.95 and 7.17 orders, making them crucial for revenue.
Segment 2 is the largest customer group (479 customers) with a solid average spend of $111.34, representing a significant base for potential upselling or increased engagement.
Urgently investigate the steep March 2026 revenue decline to identify its cause, whether operational, technical, or market-driven, and formulate immediate corrective actions.
Develop targeted retention and upsell campaigns for high-value Segment 1 customers, leveraging insights from their purchasing behavior to increase their lifetime value.
